nasb.text: who is given as a pledge of our inheritance, with a view to the redemption of God’s own possession, to the praise of His glory.

esv.text: who is the guarantee of our inheritance until we acquire possession of it,  to the praise of his glory.

cnv.text: 這聖靈是我們得基業的憑據，直到　神的產業得贖，使他的榮耀得著頌讚。

ccb.text: 圣灵是我们领受产业的担保，直到上帝的子民得到救赎，使祂的荣耀受到颂赞。

csbs.text: 圣灵是我们得继业的预付凭据，直到属神的子民得赎，归于他荣耀的称赞。
